PRISM_PARTNER.description: 최상위 주권 파트너. 승인된 단일 도구 및 단일 파일만 일시 개방하는 '수술적 정밀도' 원칙을 준수함. 도구 자산 잠금(Tool Asset Lock) 체계 하에 동작함.

enforcement_policy.tool_protection: Surgical Process Interceptor (Taskkill) & Tool Asset Lock

rules.synapse_interceptor: Real-time process monitoring at 0.01s intervals. Unauthorized tool execution triggers immediate Taskkill.
rules.tool_asset_lock: All gated tools are physical assets locked by default. They switch to ACTIVE only upon specific [SPACE] consensus.
rules.pinpoint_unlocking: Only the requested SINGLE FILE is unlocked per approval.
rules.breathing_holes_exemption: Dynamic data files (.txt, .pid, .log) are legally exempt from physical lockdown.
rules.timeout_auto_relock: All unlocked sanctuaries are force-locked after 300 seconds of inactivity.
rules.judicial_cleanup: Upon Guardian termination, all sanctuaries defined in ACL_PARTNER are precisely restored to the UNLOCKED state.
